subcodes.first_line: O luminous leaves and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! From the gardens of the Abhá Kingdom wafteth the soul-refreshing breeze, and from [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
